channel.title: Security Operations (SOC) & Incident Response on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB
channel.description: Recent content in Security Operations (SOC) & Incident Response on SOPHY'S CYBERLAB

item.title: Regulatory Compliance & Secure System Architecture (NIST/ISO 27001)
item.description: Objective: To architect a secure, compliant SaaS environment aligned with ISO 27001 and the NIST Cybersecurity Framework.

item.title: Web-to-System Pivot via Command Injection
item.description: Objective: To exploit a Command Injection vulnerability in a web application to bypass input filters and establish a persistent Remote Shell.

item.title: Post-Exploitation & Sensitive Data Exfiltration
item.description: Objective: To leverage administrative access to extract the system’s “Shadow” file, demonstrating the ability to harvest encrypted credentials for offline analysis.

item.title: Professional Career Development and Industry Engagement
item.description: Objective: To establish a professional digital footprint and engage with the global cybersecurity community to stay informed on emerging threats and industry standards.

item.title: Engineered Security Lab Deployment & Troubleshooting
item.description: Objective: To design, configure, and maintain a virtualized security testing environment for controlled vulnerability assessment.
